General.Name: Midas Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Midas Minerals Limited engages in exploration and evaluation of mineral resources in Western Australia and Canada. It explores for gold, lithium, copper, nickel, platinoids, and base metals as well as platinum group elements. The company was incorporated in 2018 is based in West Perth, Australia.

1.Name: Mr. Carl Domenic Travaglini C.A., C.S.
1.Title: Chief Financial Officer
